formValidation.title: Needs attention
formValidation.tooLong: {field} must be no more than {count} characters.
formValidation.pattern: {field} does not match the required format.

fileUpload.defaultMultipleHint: Up to {count} files per batch · {size} per file
fileUpload.filesWrongType: {names} do not match the accepted types ({types}).
fileUpload.singleFileOnly: This action accepts exactly one file.
fileUpload.tooManyFiles: You can add up to {count} files in one batch.

apiErrors.genericWithCode: The request failed ({code}). Please try again.
apiErrors.RATE_LIMITED: Too many requests. Please wait a moment and try again.
apiErrors.NETWORK_ERROR: Network connection failed. Check your connection and try again.
apiErrors.DATABASE_TARGET_NOT_EMPTY: The selected database already contains a PhD Atlas workspace. Initial setup will not overwrite it; choose an empty database or migrate from the existing installation.
apiErrors.SERVER_ERROR: Unexpected server error. Please try again later.
apiErrors.SERVER_UNAVAILABLE: The PhD Atlas server is unavailable. Make sure the full service is running, then try again.
apiErrors.TOKEN_EXPIRED: Your session expired. Please sign in again.
apiErrors.UNTRUSTED_ORIGIN: Passkeys are only available from a trusted PhD Atlas address.
apiErrors.UNKNOWN_USER: The signed-in user no longer exists.
apiErrors.FORBIDDEN: You do not have permission to perform this action.
apiErrors.EMAIL_EXISTS: An account already exists for this email.
apiErrors.EMAIL_ALREADY_VERIFIED: This receiving email is already verified.
apiErrors.EMAIL_LIMIT_REACHED: You can save up to five receiving email addresses.
apiErrors.EMAIL_VERIFICATION_COOLDOWN: Please wait for the resend countdown to finish.
apiErrors.SMTP_NOT_CONFIGURED: Outgoing email is not configured yet. Ask the administrator to set up system mail first.
apiErrors.SMTP_ERROR: Mail delivery failed. Check mail settings and try again.
apiErrors.MAIL_NOT_CONFIGURED: Mail settings are incomplete. Check the host, port, and mailbox settings.
apiErrors.MAIL_CONNECTION_FAILED: Could not connect to the mail server. Check the incoming mail settings.
apiErrors.MAIL_ATTACHMENT_TOO_LARGE: An attachment is too large to include in an email.
apiErrors.MAIL_FETCH_ERROR: Mail sync failed. Check incoming mail settings and try again.
apiErrors.INVALID_EMAIL_CODE: Email verification code is incorrect or has expired.
apiErrors.NOT_FOUND: The requested item was not found.
apiErrors.PASSKEY_ALREADY_REGISTERED: This passkey is already connected to your account.
apiErrors.PASSKEY_NOT_FOUND: That passkey is not connected to PhD Atlas.
apiErrors.PASSKEY_VERIFICATION_FAILED: Passkey verification failed. Try again or sign in with your password.
apiErrors.EXPIRED: This link or item has expired.
apiErrors.FILE_REQUIRED: Upload at least one file first.
apiErrors.UNSUPPORTED_FILE_TYPE: This file type is not supported.
apiErrors.INVALID_UPDATE_PACKAGE: This is not a supported PhD Atlas update package.
apiErrors.UPDATE_INTEGRITY_FAILED: The update package failed its integrity check. Download it again from the official Release.
apiErrors.UPDATE_APPLY_FAILED: The update failed and the previous runtime was restored.
apiErrors.SETUP_ALREADY_COMPLETED: Initial setup has already been completed. Sign in with the administrator account.
apiErrors.LIMIT_FILE_SIZE: Each file must stay within the per-file size limit.
apiErrors.LIMIT_FILE_COUNT: Too many files were selected for one batch.
apiErrors.LIMIT_UNEXPECTED_FILE: This upload contains more files than the destination accepts.
apiErrors.STORAGE_QUOTA_EXCEEDED_FREE: Storage is full. Upgrade to Pro to unlock more space.
apiErrors.STORAGE_QUOTA_EXCEEDED_ADMIN: Storage is full. Contact an administrator to increase your storage limit.
apiErrors.APPLICATION_LIMIT_REACHED: Application records are capped at {limit}. Upgrade to Pro or ask an administrator to raise the limit.
apiErrors.APPLICATION_CREATE_LIMIT_REACHED: You have reached the lifetime creation limit of {limit} applications. Upgrade to Pro or ask an administrator to raise the limit.
apiErrors.TEAM_APPLICATION_LIMIT_REACHED: Team application records are capped at {limit}. Ask a system administrator to raise the team limit.
apiErrors.TEAM_NOT_ACCESSIBLE: You do not have access to this organization, or it is no longer available.
apiErrors.TEAM_STORAGE_QUOTA_EXCEEDED: Team storage is full. Ask a system administrator to raise the quota or remove files first.
apiErrors.TEAM_TRANSFER_NOT_AVAILABLE: This application cannot be moved between personal and organization workspaces right now.
apiErrors.TEAM_TRANSFER_NOT_FOUND: The pending team transfer request was not found.
apiErrors.TEAM_TRANSFER_PENDING_LIMIT: You already have the maximum number of applications waiting for team approval. Resolve one before submitting another.
apiErrors.TEAM_TRANSFER_STUDENT_REQUIRED: Only active student accounts in the organization can move applications in or out.
apiErrors.SHARE_LIMIT_REACHED: Active share links are capped at {limit}. Upgrade to Pro or ask an administrator to raise the limit.
apiErrors.SHARE_CREATE_LIMIT_REACHED: You have reached the lifetime creation limit of {limit} share links. Upgrade to Pro or ask an administrator to raise the limit.
apiErrors.PRO_REQUIRED: This action requires a Pro account. Upgrade to Pro to continue.
apiErrors.PRO_REQUIRED_BACKUP: Backup controls require a Pro account. Upgrade to Pro to continue.
apiErrors.PRO_REQUIRED_DRAFTS: Draft mailbox requires a Pro account. Upgrade to Pro to continue.
apiErrors.PRO_REQUIRED_TRASH: Trash recovery requires a Pro account. Upgrade to Pro to continue.
apiErrors.APPLICATION_EXISTS: An application with this id already exists.
apiErrors.VALIDATION_ERROR: Check the form and try again.
apiErrors.MISSING_FILE: File metadata exists, but the stored file is missing.
apiErrors.LAST_ADMIN: At least one active administrator is required.
apiErrors.APPLICATION_BACKUP_REQUIRES_CONTEXT: Application backup restore requires an active user context.
apiErrors.UNSUPPORTED_BACKUP_SCOPE: Workspace backups can only be restored by an administrator.
apiErrors.SEAT_LIMIT_REACHED: This team has reached its seat limit ({limit}). Remove a member or ask an administrator to raise it.
apiErrors.MEMBER_ALREADY_INVITED: This email already has a pending or active invite for this team.
apiErrors.TEAM_ROLE_FORBIDDEN: You do not have permission to do that for this team.
apiErrors.IMPERSONATION_TARGET_NOT_FOUND: The target account could not be found.
apiErrors.IMPERSONATION_FORBIDDEN: You do not have permission to enter this account.
apiErrors.TEAM_STUDENT_NOT_FOUND: No eligible student account was found.
apiErrors.TEAM_STUDENT_FORBIDDEN: You can only create applications for students you manage.
apiErrors.TEAM_STUDENT_REQUIRED: Only a student team role can share their own new application with a team.
apiErrors.TEAM_VISIBILITY_OWNER_REQUIRED: Only the student who owns this application can change team visibility.
apiErrors.TEAM_MERGE_CONFLICT: The same field was changed by someone else. The system placed it in the student's manual conflict queue.
apiErrors.APPLICATION_VERSION_CONFLICT: The server copy changed while you were offline. Review the latest version before saving again.
apiErrors.EMAIL_MISMATCH: This invitation was sent to a different email address.
apiErrors.PROVIDER_UNAVAILABLE: Couldn't reach the AI provider. Check your network and try again.
apiErrors.PROVIDER_REJECTED: The AI provider rejected the request. Check the model name, API key, and endpoint.
apiErrors.PROVIDER_TIMEOUT: The AI provider took too long to respond. Try again in a moment.
apiErrors.INVALID_BASE_URL: The provider endpoint URL is invalid.
apiErrors.INVALID_BASE_URL_HTTPS: The provider endpoint must use a public HTTPS address.
apiErrors.INVALID_BASE_URL_LOCAL: The provider endpoint can't point to a local network address.
apiErrors.EMPTY_STREAM: The AI provider returned no content. Try again or switch models.
apiErrors.EMPTY_DRAFT: The AI provider didn't return a draft. Try again with clearer instructions.
apiErrors.KEY_UNAVAILABLE: This AI key is unavailable. Re-enter the secret or add a new key.
apiErrors.UNSUPPORTED_PROVIDER: This AI provider isn't supported yet.
apiErrors.AI_KEY_TEST_FAILED: Couldn't verify this AI key. Check the provider, model, and network.
apiErrors.AI_KEY_NOT_FOUND: That AI key was not found.
apiErrors.AI_KEY_SCOPE_MISMATCH: Shared organization keys can only be used for applications in that organization.
apiErrors.AI_ATTACHMENTS_UNSUPPORTED: This provider or model can't accept one or more of the selected attachments.
apiErrors.AI_DRAFT_FAILED: AI drafting failed. Please try again.
apiErrors.TEAM_AI_ADMIN_REQUIRED: Only organization administrators can manage shared AI keys.
apiErrors.TEAM_DISCOVER_FORBIDDEN: Only team owners and teachers can run Team Discover.
apiErrors.TEAM_DISCOVER_KEY_FORBIDDEN: Team Discover can only use a key from the selected team.
apiErrors.TEAM_DISCOVER_TARGET_FORBIDDEN: You can only research an assigned active student.
apiErrors.TEAM_DISCOVER_TARGET_REQUIRED: Choose both a team and an assigned student for Team Discover.
apiErrors.AI_ENRICHMENT_FAILED: AI enrichment failed. Please try again.
apiErrors.AI_ENRICHMENT_INVALID: The AI response could not be converted into a safe enrichment preview.
apiErrors.AI_KEY_REQUIRED: Select an AI key before running this AI action.
apiErrors.AI_RESEARCH_FAILED: AI research failed. Please try again.
apiErrors.AI_STREAM_UNAVAILABLE: The AI response stream is unavailable. Please try again.
apiErrors.API_HTML_RESPONSE: The server returned a web page instead of API data. Restart the PhD Atlas server and try again.
apiErrors.ATTACHMENT_NOT_FOUND: The requested attachment could not be found.
apiErrors.CORS_ORIGIN_DENIED: This web address is not allowed to access PhD Atlas.
apiErrors.DISCOVER_CATALOG_EMPTY: No valid programs were found in the uploaded catalog file.
apiErrors.DISCOVER_ADVISOR_EMAIL_REQUIRED: The selected advisor does not have a verified email address.
apiErrors.DISCOVER_ADVISOR_NOT_VERIFIED: A real advisor profile and email are required before this program can be added to applications.
apiErrors.DISCOVER_PI_NOT_FOUND: The selected advisor was not found for this program.
apiErrors.DISCOVER_PROGRAM_NOT_VERIFIED: This program is missing a verified official source or current application deadline. Refresh research before importing it.
apiErrors.DISCOVER_PROGRAM_NOT_FOUND: The selected program was not found in the Discover catalog.
apiErrors.ENRICHMENT_APPLICATION_MISMATCH: This enrichment preview belongs to a different application.
apiErrors.ENRICHMENT_PREVIEW_STALE: The best catalog match changed. Generate a new preview before applying it.
apiErrors.INVALID_ENCRYPTION_PASSWORD: The current encryption password is incorrect.
apiErrors.MAIL_FETCH_EMPTY_SCOPE: Add an application with a professor email before syncing mail.
apiErrors.MAIL_FETCH_NOT_CONFIGURED: Incoming mail is not configured yet.
apiErrors.MAIL_FETCH_UNSUPPORTED_PROTOCOL: Automatic and historical mail sync require IMAP.
apiErrors.PUSH_DELIVERY_FAILED: The test notification could not be delivered to this device.
apiErrors.REQUEST_TIMEOUT: The request took too long. Please try again.
apiErrors.SEAT_LIMIT_TOO_LOW: The seat limit cannot be lower than the {limit} seats currently in use.
apiErrors.SESSION_IDENTITY_MISMATCH: The response belongs to a different session. Sign in again before continuing.
apiErrors.TEACHER_NOT_FOUND: No teacher or organization administrator is available to notify.
apiErrors.TEAM_ID_REQUIRED: Select a team workspace before continuing.
apiErrors.TEAM_IMPERSONATION_SCOPE_REQUIRED: This temporary team view cannot access or modify personal workspace data.
apiErrors.TEAM_REQUIRED: Share this application with the team before requesting feedback.
apiErrors.TEAM_SHARE_CREATE_LIMIT_REACHED: The team has reached its lifetime creation limit of {limit} share links. Ask a system administrator to raise it.
apiErrors.TEAM_SHARE_LIMIT_REACHED: The team has reached its limit of {limit} active share links. Ask a system administrator to raise it.
apiErrors.UNSAFE_ATTACHMENT: This attachment could not be accepted safely. Check its type and contents, then try again.
apiErrors.UNTRUSTED_HOST: This PhD Atlas server address is not trusted.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.message: This page doesn't exist, or the link is out of date.
notFound.applicationMessage: This application doesn't exist, or you don't have access to it.

offlineStatus.offlineDetail: You can keep working from the local copy. Supported personal application edits will sync when the connection returns.
offlineStatus.manualDetail: You chose to work offline. Personal application edits are saved locally and will wait until you resume online mode.
offlineStatus.serverUnavailableDetail: This device has internet access, but PhD Atlas cannot reach its server. Local work remains available.
offlineStatus.slowDetail: The server is reachable, but responses are taking longer than usual. Local changes remain protected.
offlineStatus.checkingDetail: PhD Atlas is checking the real server connection, not only the browser's network indicator.
offlineStatus.onlineDetail: The server is reachable and local changes can sync normally.
offlineStatus.snapshotSafe: Your last local workspace copy is available on this device.
offlineStatus.reviewBlocked: Review {count} change(s) that could not merge safely
offlineStatus.reviewLoaded: Your preserved offline copy is open as an unsaved draft. Review it before choosing Save or Discard.
offlineStatus.updateConfirmMessage: You have unsaved edits. Save or discard them before updating, or continue only if you are comfortable reloading this view.

blockedReason.conflict: The server and offline copy changed the same part of this application. Review it before saving again.
blockedReason.missing: This application no longer exists on the server. Your offline copy was kept for review.
blockedReason.permission: Your access to this application changed while offline. The local copy was not uploaded.
blockedReason.unverifiable: This older offline change has no safe comparison point and was kept for review.

dialog.title: Application dossier
dialog.teamCreateForStudentHint: The application will belong to that student's account and appear in both the student and assigned teacher workspaces.
dialog.teamCreateAsStudentHint: This application stays owned by you first. It enters teacher or institution-admin approval before it counts as a team application.
dialog.teamNoStudents: No eligible students yet. Add students and assign teachers from the Members page first.

toast.teamVisibilityPrivate: Application moved back to personal workspace
toast.commQueued: Saved - configure SMTP in Settings to send for real
toast.sessionExpired: Your session expired. Please sign in again.
toast.unexpectedError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
toast.mailSyncQueued: Sync was handed to the server and will continue in the background. You can safely refresh or leave this page.
toast.mailSyncAlreadyRunning: A server-side mail sync is already running.
toast.mailSyncBackgroundFailed: Background mail sync failed ({code}). Check the mailbox settings and try again.
toast.mailFetchFiled: Imported {count} new email(s) into correspondence ({incoming} received, {outgoing} sent)
toast.mailHistoryNoMail: No previous matching professor mail to import
toast.mailSyncNeedsRetry: Mail settings or the application list changed during sync. Run sync once more to finish safely.
toast.testEmailUnavailable: Test email functionality requires backend SMTP integration.
toast.noUploadedFile: No uploaded file for this material yet.
toast.offlineSyncBlocked: {count} offline change(s) need review before syncing
toast.offlineActionNeedsOnline: This action needs a live connection for permission and quota checks.
toast.offlineSaveNeedsOnline: This save needs a live connection because it changes shared or permissioned data.
toast.connectionRestored: Connection restored. Local changes are being reconciled.
toast.connectionStillUnavailable: PhD Atlas still cannot reach the server. You can continue with the available offline workspace.
toast.manualOfflineEnabled: Offline work enabled. Supported personal application edits will stay on this device until you resume online mode.
toast.manualOfflineDisabled: Online mode resumed. PhD Atlas is checking and reconciling local changes.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.subtitle: Open an update first, review the context, then jump to the exact workspace item.

detail.emptyBody: Details, routing, and source context will appear here.

item.sentEmailImportedBody: "{subject}" sent from your mailbox was imported into {school} correspondence.
item.discoverMatchBody: {program} looks like a strong fit for your Discover criteria.
item.discoverDeadlineBody: Typical cycle deadline {deadline} is approaching (verify officially).

notificationPublisher.bodyPlaceholder: Write the message recipients will see.
notificationPublisher.deliveryHint: Send in-app, by email, or both.
notificationPublisher.groupDialogDesc: Create reusable groups manually or import them from CSV.
notificationPublisher.noSavedGroupsDesc: Save a group or import a CSV template to reuse recipients later.
notificationPublisher.csvHint: Use columns group_name and member_email. Add one row per member.
notificationPublisher.csvInvalid: Upload CSV files with group_name and member_email columns.
notificationPublisher.csvNoGroups: No valid groups were found in the selected CSV files.
notificationPublisher.csvInvalidFiles: {count} CSV files were invalid and were skipped.
notificationPublisher.csvUnknown: {count} rows could not match a recipient and were skipped.
notificationPublisher.csvEmptyPreview: Download the template, fill one row per group member, then upload the CSV here.
notificationPublisher.composeRequired: Add a title and message first.
notificationPublisher.chooseChannel: Choose at least one delivery channel.
notificationPublisher.chooseTarget: Choose at least one recipient, group, or audience.
notificationPublisher.groupMembersRequired: Choose at least one group member.

review.placeholder: Add team feedback... Use @name to mention team members
review.emptyHint: Start a discussion about this application with your team.

commandPalette.title: Command Palette
commandPalette.emptyHint: Try a page name, action, or shortcut.
commandPalette.showBoardDesc: Switch the workspace to board view.
commandPalette.showListDesc: Switch the workspace to list view.
commandPalette.toggleApplicationsDesc: Show or hide the application pane.
commandPalette.toggleInspectorDesc: Show or hide the inspector pane.
commandPalette.toggleThemeDesc: Switch between light and dark mode.
commandPalette.replayTourDesc: Start the guided product tour again.
